name: Talked to insurance adjuster after machine injury, messed up?
description: Get lawyer before more talks; protect your claim.

mainEntity.name: Talked to insurance adjuster after machine injury, messed up?

acceptedAnswer.text: Get lawyer before more talks; protect your claim.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Possibly; they minimize payouts—don't give recorded statements without lawyer.** Stick to facts; no settlement talk[4]. Review what said. Attorney negotiates better.
